action.finish_summary: Elicited requirements for the SYNN cryptocurrency ICO page: 1) Wallet Connectivity: Support for Trust Wallet and MetaMask connections. 2) Token Management: Users can deposit and withdraw SYNN tokens. 3) Token Details Display: Show token balance, claimer information, quantity, and status (specific meanings of 'claimer' and 'status' are undefined by the user). 4) Cross-Browser Functionality: Page must work correctly across different browsers. 5) Visual Design: Pearl background with charcoal interface. No token sale/purchase functionality is required—the page is purely for depositing, withdrawing, and viewing existing SYNN holdings. Details not specified by the user include: blockchain network, smart contract status, confirmation workflows, transaction history, error handling, mobile responsiveness, wallet connection UI pattern, amount entry method, min/max limits, wallet address display, disconnect option, session persistence, informational content, and loading states.
